reviews.reviewer: By The Reviews Hub - East Anglia & South East May 11, 2025 Updated: August 9, 20
reviews.excerpt: We’re watching an attempted murder, live on stage at Brighton Komedia. A rambunctious rich tea biscuit is taking too many liberties, and is soon to be dunked-off by his former pals, Jammy Dodger, Bourbon, et al., in a dreaded Sports Direct mug. The Biscuit Barrel are a self-defined semi-professional sketch group who are making waves on the comedy circuit. Is their show best of the barrel, or are t
